glFormSub: Enter your name and phone number or email to log in.
glNotFound: We couldn't find your details. Check the name and contact.
glMismatch: The name doesn't match the contact. Please try again.
grSuccessText: Your registration is awaiting approval from the restaurant. You'll be notified once you're added to the guest records.
grSub: Sign up and enjoy faster reservations and special offers.
grNotesPh: E.g. nut allergy, prefer a table by the window...
grConsent: I agree to the restaurant's terms of use and privacy policy. My data is kept solely for guest record-keeping.
grAgreeRequired: Consent to the terms of use is required.
grPending: Your request has already been sent and is awaiting the restaurant's approval.
grExists: You're already registered with this restaurant. Log in via the login page.
gppNotFound: We couldn't find your details. Check the phone or email.
gppPendingAcc: Your account is awaiting the restaurant's approval.
gppLoginDesc: Enter your phone or email to access your profile.
